返回本批次

VitruvianOS – 受 BeOS 启发的桌面 Linux

VitruvianOS – Desktop Linux Inspired by the BeOS

v-os.dev 作者 felixding 分数 99 评论 50 2026/03/25 11:17
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 快速、反应灵敏且易于使用的界面V\OS 旨在以最小的延迟和直观的导航提供无缝的用户体验。免费和开源完全免费且完全开源。 Vitruvian 站在巨人的肩膀上 — 基于 Linux 构建，受到 Haiku 和 BeOS.KISS 的启发，非常易于使用。它具有直观的桌面并采用 KISS 原则。任何人都可以快速熟悉并使用 V\OS。用户体验、工作流程和舒适度是关键。家庭规则这是您的计算机，您的规则。这是 V\OS 的一个关键原则。我们不收集数据，我们不会与您作对。你是老板。您的操作系统旨在做您想做的事，而不妨碍您。以社区为中心开发团队和社区之间有着紧密的联系和良好的关系。我们与用户沟通，并不断利用他们的反馈来改进 V\OS。OOTB一切都“开箱即用”，无需配置任何内容或安装额外的应用程序。准备好了。虽然它的可配置性很强，但默认情况下一切都已设置和调整得很好，不会提出不必要的问题。Nexus 内核 BridgeNexus 是 Vitruvian 的定制 Linux 内核子系统，它将 BeOS 风格的节点监控、设备跟踪和消息传递引入 Linux，从而可以在标准 Linux 内核上运行 Haiku 应用程序。什么是 VitruvianOS？V\OS 是一个基于 Linux 的操作系统，深受 BeOS 的启发，将经典操作系统的优雅和简单带到了现代。通过利用 Linux 的优势，同时保持 BeOS 的用户友好性，V\OS 提供了性能和可用性的独特结合。 V\OS 通过集成临时构建的内核模块和实时补丁来利用 Linux 的强大功能，从而提供反应灵敏且愉快的用户体验。 V\OS 支持 Linux 上的 BeOS/Haiku 运行时，几乎不需要 API 更改。支持的引导文件系统是 XFS 和 SquashFS，包括对扩展属性的支持。文件系统索引、实时查询和图形登录的多用户支持计划在即将发布的版本中发布。默认情况下，系统附带一个包含实时补丁的 Linux 内核，同时提供对非 rt Linux 内核的支持。有任何问题吗？您可以加入我们的小组。如果您有问题、想法或想要贡献，可以在 GitHub 和 Telegram 上加入我们。阅读常见问题解答来自我们的博客最新消息版权所有 (c) 2018 - 2025，VitruvianOS 团队；保留所有权利。模板由 Bootstrapious 制作。由 DevCows 移植到 Hugo。

Original Summary

  1. Fast, reactive, and easy-to-use interfaceV\OS aims to provide a seamless user experience with minimal latency and intuitive navigation.Free and Open SourceCompletely free of cost and fully open source. Vitruvian stands on the shoulders of giants — built on Linux and inspired by Haiku and BeOS.KISSIt’s very easy to use. It features an intuitive desktop and adopts KISS principles. Anyone can rapidly feel at home and use V\OS. User experience, workflow and comfort is key.Home ruleIt’s your computer, your rules. This is a key principle at V\OS. We don’t collect data, we don’t work against you. You’re the boss. Your operating system is designed to do what you want without getting in your way.Community-centricThere is a tight bond and a great relationship between the development team and the community. We communicate with our users and constantly use their feedback to improve V\OS.OOTBEverything just works "Out Of The Box", without the need to configure anything or to install extra applications. It’s ready to go. Although it’s very configurable, everything is set and tuned nicely by default and no unnecessary questions are asked.Nexus Kernel BridgeNexus is Vitruvian's custom Linux kernel subsystem that brings BeOS-style node monitoring, device tracking, and messaging to Linux — making it possible to run Haiku applications on a standard Linux kernel.What is VitruvianOS?V\OS is an operating system based on linux heavily inspired by the BeOS, bringing the elegance and simplicity of a classic operating system to modern days. By leveraging the strengths of Linux while maintaining the user-friendly aspects of BeOS, V\OS offers a unique blend of performance and usability. V\OS leverages the power of linux by integrating ad-hoc built kernel modules and real time patches for a reactive and enjoyable user experience. V\OS supports the BeOS/Haiku runtime on Linux with minimal to no API changes.The boot file systems supported are XFS and SquashFS including support for extended attributes. File system indexing, live queries, and multiuser support with graphical login are planned to be released in upcoming versions. By default the system ships a linux kernel including real time patches while at the same time providing support for non-rt linux kernels.Have any questions?You can join our groups.If you have questions, ideas, or want to contribute, you can join us on GitHub and Telegram.Read FAQsFrom our blogLatest newsCopyright (c) 2018 - 2025, VitruvianOS Team; all rights reserved.Template by Bootstrapious. Ported to Hugo by DevCows.

rebolek 2026/03/25 13:36
如果您喜欢 BeOS，请看一下 Haiku https://www.haiku-os.org/ ，这是一个非常好的、非常有用的系统，直接基于 BeOS。
If you like BeOS, take a look at Haiku https://www.haiku-os.org/ , it's very nice and very usable system based directly on BeOS.
在 HN 中查看
10729287 2026/03/25 15:51
自个人版以来，我一直是 Beos 理念的粉丝，但从未有机会在钢铁上运行它，因为当时我太穷了，没有两台机器，现在我怀念 Haiku 启动时的登录/密码提示。但我正在密切关注它，我希望能够将它安装在我的 X220 上作为网络/邮件机器！
I've been a fan of Beos philosophy since the Personal Edition but never had the occasion to run it on steel as I was too poor to have two machines back in the days, and now I miss login/password prompt at boot on Haiku. But i'm following it closely and I hope i'll be able to install it on my X220 for a web/mail machine !

pjmlp 2026/03/25 13:58
更好的选择是运行真正的交易，而不是某些兼容层。
And much better option, running the real deal, instead of some compatibility layer.
在 HN 中查看
AlecSchueler 2026/03/25 14:55
大概有很多为 Linux 编写的现代软件，您最终会通过 Haiku 的兼容层运行它们？更好的选择似乎是相对的。不过我可能记错了 Linux 程序是如何在 Haiku 上处理的。
Presumably there's a lot more modern software written for Linux which you'd end up running through a compatibility layer from Haiku? The better option seems relative. I could be misremembering how Linux programmes are handled on Haiku though.

c-c-c-c-c 2026/03/25 15:05
但 Vitruvian 正在运行自己的图形堆栈，因此 X11 或 Wayland 应用程序将不会运行。
But Vitruvian is running its own graphics stack so no X11 or wayland applications will run afaict.

anthk 2026/03/25 15:51
有了 xlibe，他们就应该这么做。
With xlibe they should.
在 HN 中查看
pjmlp 2026/03/25 14:58
也许这个谬论并没有探索特定操作系统的优势？

我们不需要到处克隆 UNIX。

Maybe the fallacy is not exploring what a given OS is great at?

We don't need to clone UNIX all over the place.

在 HN 中查看
watersb 2026/03/25 12:32
25 年前，我配置 GNOME 来运行类似 BeOS 的选项卡式窗口管理器。在 Sun 工作站上。

但事实并非如此。或者不仅是：

Nexus 内核桥

Nexus 是 Vitruvian 的定制 Linux 内核子系统，它将 BeOS 风格的节点监控、设备跟踪和消息传递引入 Linux，从而可以在标准 Linux 内核上运行 Haiku 应用程序。

它声称运行 Haiku 的应用程序，Haiku 是现代 BeOS 的当前开源实现。

25 years ago, I configured GNOME to run a BeOS-like tabbed window manager. On a sun workstation.

But that's not what this is. Or not only:

Nexus Kernel Bridge

Nexus is Vitruvian's custom Linux kernel subsystem that brings BeOS-style node monitoring, device tracking, and messaging to Linux — making it possible to run Haiku applications on a standard Linux kernel.

It claims to run apps from Haiku, the current open-source implementation of a modern BeOS.

在 HN 中查看
donatj 2026/03/25 13:53
重要的问题是，您能否将不同应用程序的窗口装饰“选项卡”堆叠到单个选项卡堆栈中，就像在 BeOS 中一样？

此处演示（动画）：

https://www.haiku-os.org/docs/userguide/en/images/gui-images...

The important question becomes can you stack the window decoration "tabs" of different apps into a single stack of tabs like in BeOS?

Demonstrated here (animated):

https://www.haiku-os.org/docs/userguide/en/images/gui-images...

在 HN 中查看
thisislife2 2026/03/25 13:19
这很有趣——一个真正与众不同的 Linux 发行版 技术上，而不仅仅是拥有不同的 GUI/桌面环境。
This is interesting - a Linux distro that really differentiates itself technically, instead of just having a different GUI / desktop environment.
在 HN 中查看
rcarmo 2026/03/25 15:31
我希望这不仅仅是外观。将各种应用程序的选项卡分组到一个窗口中的能力是它拥有的最好的用户体验功能，有时我仍然怀念它。
I hope it’s not just the look. The ability to group tabs from various apps into a single window was the best UX feature it had, and I still miss it sometimes.
在 HN 中查看
WD-42 2026/03/25 14:21
具有深度的 UI 元素现在看起来非常令人垂涎欲滴。因此，超越极简主义并努力反弹。
UI elements that have depth look so mouth-wateringly good now. So over the minimalism and bouncing back hard.

nico 2026/03/25 13:49
BeOS 在当时是一次非常棒的体验。真的感觉很神奇。可惜被关停了。我想知道今天的演变会是什么样子
BeOS was such an amazing experience back in the day. It really felt magical. Too bad it got shutdown. I wonder what the evolution of it would be like today

eightman 2026/03/25 13:53
https://www.haiku-os.org/
https://www.haiku-os.org/
在 HN 中查看
AlecSchueler 2026/03/25 14:59
我喜欢俳句，但我觉得它与今天的 BeOS 有很大不同 BeOS 是否继续存在。在另一个世界中，BeOS 可能会更快地进入行业的其他领域，产生更大的影响，而且这种影响可能会像滚雪球一样越滚越大。
I love Haiku but I feel it's quite different than where BeOS would be today had BeOS continued to exist. In that alternative world there might have been considerably more influence from BeOS going into the rest of the industry much sooner, and that effect could have snowballed.
在 HN 中查看
silisili 2026/03/25 14:17
我对 BeOS 的第一印象是它可以独立播放媒体。 您可以在一个窗口中播放视频，在另一个窗口中播放 MP3 或另一个视频，并且它们会同时播放音频。

我不知道到底为什么，但我觉得这很有趣，因为当时所有其他操作系统似乎都做不到。

My first memory of BeOS was that it could play media independently. You could play a video in one window, and an MP3 or another video in another, and they'd both play audio at the same time.

I don't know exactly why, but child me thought that was so interesting, since every other OS at the time seemed unable to.

在 HN 中查看
pjmlp 2026/03/25 15:30
对我来说，感觉这将是我的下一个 Amiga，在某种体验上，这是 GNU/Linux 从未对我做过的事情，其中​​ CLI 占主导地位，多媒体总是被轻视，Windows 和 Mac OS 也不在那里。

另一个很酷的产品是 QNX。

For me it felt like it was going to be my next Amiga, in kind of experience, something that GNU/Linux never did it to me, where CLI reigns and multimedia was always looked down upon, Windows and Mac OS weren't quite there as well.

Another cool one that was around was QNX.

在 HN 中查看
setopt 2026/03/25 14:53
如果我没记错的话，苹果当时正在收购 BeOS 和 NeXT 之间。如果他们走 Be 路线而不是 Unix 路线，会发生什么将会很有趣。 （但考虑到 MacOS 和 BeOS 当时都处于边缘，也许他们就会破产……）
If I recall directly, Apple was between buying BeOS and NeXT. Would be interesting what would have happened if they went the Be route instead of the Unix route. (But given that MacOS and BeOS were both fringe at the time, perhaps they would just have gone bankrupt…)
在 HN 中查看
ab5tract 2026/03/25 15:34
考虑到史蒂夫·乔布斯 (Steve Jobs) 带着 NeXT 来了，普遍的共识是他们的康复不会那么显着。

对我来说，真正的假设是思考如果惠普和其他供应商没有向 Wintel 卡特尔屈服，放弃将 BeOS 作为预装 OEM 选项的计划，情况会怎样。 Be 在民事法庭起诉微软，Be 赢得了官司，但为时已晚。

Considering that Steve Jobs came with NeXT, the general consensus has been that their recovery would not have been nearly as significant.

The real what-if for me is pondering what might have been had HP and other vendors not caved to the Wintel cartel in abandoning their plans to include BeOS as a preinstalled OEM option. Microsoft was sued by Be in civil court and Be won their case, but it was too little too late.

在 HN 中查看
panick21_ 2026/03/25 15:42
我认为当时每个人都同意，与 NeXT 相比，BeOS 需要投入更多的工作。尽管如此，将 NeXT 发展到 OSX 仍然需要大量的工作。

所以我完全可以想象苹果会把这件事搞砸并被收购。

I think at the time everybody agree that BeOS would need a whole lot more work put into it compared to NeXT. That said it still took a huge amount of work to evolve NeXT to OSX.

So I can well imagine Apple fucking this up and getting aquired.

在 HN 中查看
ErroneousBosh 2026/03/25 15:43
如果您的要求不是太高，现在您几乎可以将俳句用作日常驾驶。它在较旧的硬件上也运行得很好。

当然，如果您只想玩一会儿，您可以在虚拟机中启动它。

You can pretty much just use Haiku as a daily driver these days, if your demands aren't too great. It runs really well on older hardware too.

And of course you can just spin it up in a VM if you only want to play a bit.

I just found my BeOS 5 and BeProductive CDs from the late 90s. I wish I had something to run them on.

Ok maybe I’m too young, but what is BeOS? Everyone here is linking other alternatives, but no one’s linked to the original BeOS. Or is it gone now?

gjvc 2026/03/25 15:39

stick around...
在 HN 中查看
aaronbrethorst 2026/03/25 13:20
维特鲁威提出了一个不同的问题：我实际上想用我的计算机做什么但目前无法做什么？

只能从左上角拖动屏幕周围的窗口

Vitruvian asks a different question: what would I actually want to do with my computer that I currently can’t?

Only be able to drag a window around the screen from the top left corner

在 HN 中查看
danwills 2026/03/25 15:21
在许多 Linux 桌面环境中，它是默认设置 - 或者可以配置：按住 Windows 键（“元”）并用鼠标左键从_窗口内的任何位置_拖动窗口！无需将鼠标移至“标题栏”！

此外，元+鼠标中键拖动允许人们从整个窗口的任何位置调整窗口大小！ （当拖动开始时，它会选择最近的角）并且无需将鼠标放在通常非常薄的窗口边框中即可调整窗口大小，在我看来这是非常解放的！到了我真的很怀念子窗口的情况，应用程序本身正在处理调整大小等！

我曾经使用过一款 Windows 应用程序，支持 Windows 上的相同功能（我认为是不同的键），恐怕不知道是否有适用于 Mac 的应用程序 - 或者是否可以将其配置为以这种方式工作，但可能有一个应用程序，因此值得研究一下，如果这听起来对您有用的话！

On many Linux desktop environments it is the default - or can be configured: To hold the Windows Key ('meta') and left-mouse-drag a window around from _anywhere inside the window_! No need to get the mouse into the 'title bar'!

Additionally, meta+middle-mouse-drag allows one to resize a window from anywhere in the whole window!! (it chooses the closest corner when the drag starts) and this, being able to resize a window without needing to put the mouse in a usually-very-thin window border, is extremely liberating in my opinion! To the point where I really miss it on sub-windows where the app is handling resizing/etc itself!

There's a Windows app I used to use that supports the same kind of thing for Windows (different key I think), no idea if there's one for Mac I'm afraid - or whether it can be configured to work that way, but there probably is one so it would be worth investigating if this sounds useful to you I'd say!

在 HN 中查看
ianlevesque 2026/03/25 13:23

To be fair that's one more corner than Tahoe.

Is this a new window manager and tracker or something skinned for this use case? Wayland, X11? There’s a screenshots section but the details are sparse.

dddw 2026/03/25 15:46
如果您这样做，请分享屏幕截图。该显示器的刷新率是多少？
Do share a screenshot if you do. What refreshrate do you have on that display?
在 HN 中查看
ofrzeta 2026/03/25 13:38
“实时修补 Linux 内核以实现低延迟桌面使用”——这真的有意义吗？我认为几十年来已经有各种类似的努力，但据我所知，它们都没有真正为最终用户带来巨大的改变。
"Real-time patched Linux kernel for low-latency desktop use" - does this really make sense? I think there have been various efforts like this over the decades but as far as I remember none of them really made a huge difference for the end user.
在 HN 中查看
worthless-trash 2026/03/25 15:26
IIRC RHEL 在自己的分支/树中维护的实时补丁集去年已上游。

我认为这对于桌面应用程序没有意义，如果声音延迟是优先考虑的，那么它可能是有意义的，但即使如此，库存内核在许多情况下也提供了较低的延迟。

IIRC the realtime patchset that RHEL maintained in its own branch/tree was upstreamed last year.

I don't think it makes sense for desktop applications, it may make sense if sound latency is a priority but even then stock kernel delivered lower latency in many cases.

在 HN 中查看

jonhohle 2026/03/25 14:16

It’s Linux, with all of the support that provides. Not a knock on Haiku, but if I can have a BeOS window manager and Tracker, while running modern Linux binaries natively, I’d be a happy.

tadfisher 2026/03/25 14:25
嗯，它不能运行 X 或 Wayland 应用程序，所以我不会将其称为这些应用程序的替代品。也许是俳句的替代品。
Well, it can't run X or Wayland apps, so I wouldn't call it an alternative to those. An alternative to Haiku maybe.

Gabrys1 2026/03/25 14:55

why no X11?

ErroneousBosh 2026/03/25 15:45
因为每个人都选择 Wayland，尽管您仍然需要 XWayland 做任何有用的事情，因为 Wayland 是滑稽的不完整。
Because everyone's going for Wayland, even though you still need XWayland to do anything useful on it because Wayland is comically incomplete.

KnuthIsGod 2026/03/25 14:07
为什么营销读起来像废话？

“VitruvianOS 是另一种 Linux 桌面，具有独特的理念：以人为本。”

https://v-os.dev/news/vitruvian-0.3.0-available/

Why does the marketing read like slop ?

"VitruvianOS is an alternative Linux desktop with a singular philosophy: the human at the center."

https://v-os.dev/news/vitruvian-0.3.0-available/
